station_address: Oshiwara Mandapeshwar, Highland Park, Jogeshwari West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102
text: I’ve been scammed here twice, doubted my car’s fuel indicator the first time, but confirmed my suspicions on the second visit. Their fuel meter is tampered with and shows you the reflected amount, but the fuel filled is barely half of it. I would recommend go to the Lotus petrol Pump instead, which is right opposite to it on the Link Road itself.

station_address: Oshiwara Mandapeshwar, Highland Park, Jogeshwari West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102
text: This is a new scam that these people are doing. I went to fill 500 deisel today.  Suddenly a man came who was their staff  and distracted me  saying your car has a big scratch on both the door.  ,let me fix it i have a solution. I got down to see it just a minor scratch. Meanwile the person filled the deisel and i payd him. When i went ahead i realised the meter and range is as it is and not moved at all. I guess these people are doing some scam. If any one has faced anything similar plss post your review...pls beware.

station_address: Oshiwara Mandapeshwar, Highland Park, Jogeshwari West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102
text:
*BEAWARE*
I have used my new Axis Bank Indian Oil Card first time and only transaction till date of Rs. 2000 on March 16, 2025 in this outlet. Today two fraudulent attempts were made to make payment to MakeMyTrip from my card as I received OTP on my number though the card was with me. It seems my card has been cloned here and misused. I blocked my card immediately and saved my money. Please take care while using your card at this outlet.

station_address: Oshiwara Mandapeshwar, Highland Park, Jogeshwari West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102
text:
Over Charging for PUC,

I went to renew the puc here, the person handed over card sealed in plastic and asked me to pay 82 rs, when i asked he said, sir taxes bad gaye hai.

I was in hurry, but later when i got home, found out it was 50 rs, and he lied to me for 32 rs.

Shame on these people! and i never asked for that plastic cover, which would anyways cost 2 rs

hope petrol pump owner sees this can corrects this

This happened on 21st Feb around 7-7:30 pm

station_address: Oshiwara Mandapeshwar, Highland Park, Jogeshwari West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102
text: Filled petrol and air, staff said air pressure is low in front right and get it checked as will take 5 minutes, having checked advised valve need replacing, paid 300 for it though found out this is common practice at this place and read same in review as well, so be careful. Petrol attendants are good, no issue there.

station_address: Oshiwara Mandapeshwar, Highland Park, Jogeshwari West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102
text:
Almost every time I have been here, they’ve said there’s a puncture and it’s in the inner tube which will take 600-700 bucks as opposed to a regular one that costs 150-200

Asked around and several other places confirmed there’s no puncture.

It’s a common malpractice to increase revenue.
